svg.text: Handoff 1: Python Client → Rust QUIC client
Contains: compressed JPEG/PNG image, base_model name,
Copies pickled bytes from Python SHM into Rust-owned Vec<u8>
ZMQ REP send "ack" — Client can reuse SHM
QUIC client internal: queue and transmit
LIFO policy: if stale frames queued, drop all but newest
s2n-quic SendStream, BBR, BW-limited by LP solver
Handoff 2: Rust QUIC server → Python ModelServer
Pickled ModelServerRequest now in server SHM
ZMQ REP send "ACK" — Rust can reuse SHM
